title: General Update on a board
excerpt: I am newer to Monday and am wondering if there is a way to update all board members on a general sort update. I don’t want to go into a specific item and update rather am wondering if there is a “general board update” op…

posts.author: deena (deenateichman)
posts.cookedHtml: I am newer to Monday and am wondering if there is a way to update all board members on a general sort update. I don’t want to go into a specific item and update rather am wondering if there is a “general board update” option that will notify and email the other board members?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@deena

Not specifically. What I have done in the past is to create an item for this purpose (usually in its own group) and add this automation to notify board subscribers:
